title: Is it just me or
wikitext:
[]: Is it just me, or...?             Quote Post by Anti-Goth » Thu Dec 20, 2007 5:19 pm ...is the younger Gendo shown in Episode 21 kind of cute? Before you all throw me in the asylum for thinking this, he does look a lot like Shinji. Though Shinji inherited Yui's facial structure, so he's more bishounen. That, and Gendo is darker-skinned. Okay. Even though his eyes are kind of bugged-looking, you know younger Gendo was HAWT. ...word.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Thu Dec 20, 2007 5:36 pm Put on a picture. That'll help. Hmm...perhaps it's because the artists got kinda "lazy" or just used another type of style for drawing them. Although I have to admit in Ep 21, he LOOKS older to me. 8)

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Thu Dec 20, 2007 5:53 pm Well he does look sexy with all the bruises! :P Btw, is Shinji considered generally bishounen?

[]:             Quote Post by Anti-Goth » Thu Dec 20, 2007 6:10 pm the_seventh_child wrote: Btw, is Shinji considered generally bishounen?

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Thu Dec 20, 2007 6:11 pm Oh my deity. Are you actually thinking this seriously?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Dec 20, 2007 6:22 pm Actually, part of the "reason" behind that pic is to show the similarities between the two. Gendou is pretty much an older, bad ass, version of Shinji, after all. Also: I think there was a thread about this somewhere, but I could be wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Thu Dec 20, 2007 6:33 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Actually, part of the "reason" behind that pic is to show the similarities between the two. Gendou is pretty much an older there fore more bad ass looking version, version of Shinji, after all, though still a complete wimp underneath. Also: I think there was a thread about this somewhere, but I could be wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Thu Dec 20, 2007 6:35 pm Wimp? Weak minded all right.

[]:             Quote Post by Anti-Goth » Thu Dec 20, 2007 6:54 pm Fools! You're all FOOLS! Episode 21 young!Gendo is smokin' HAWT. And you know it. *INSERT REDEATH REFERENCE HERE!*

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Dec 20, 2007 7:01 pm .....I think younger-looking Gendou sucks and Shinji will look much cuter, provided he'll make good friends with a gun to live that long. There, I said it.

[]:             Quote Post by Anti-Goth » Thu Dec 20, 2007 7:07 pm Boooo! D: Shinji-kun is just a boy, and he'll prolly always have that 'boyish' look. Gendo is a MAN. :P Yum.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Thu Dec 20, 2007 7:11 pm he looks like an older Shinji

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Dec 20, 2007 7:17 pm V wrote: he looks like an older Shinji

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Thu Dec 20, 2007 9:23 pm Nah, AG's got a point. Gendo isn't pretty but he isn't exactly ugly either. Shinji's bishonen all right, he's a Nadia with a paler skin tone, new hairstyle and a schoolboy uniform. (I think Gendo's skin tone is fairly close to Nadia's)

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Thu Dec 20, 2007 10:27 pm V wrote: he looks like an older Shinji

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Dec 20, 2007 11:10 pm Check out the bags under his eyes. He's definitely been smoking too much crack.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Thu Dec 20, 2007 11:18 pm So THAT'S how you come up with a plan like that. "HEY KOZO GUESS WHAT!!!?????" "....What?" "WE'RE GONNA NAIL A BIG WHITE THING TO A CROSS AND END THE WORLD!" "Erm, Ikari, I don't think-" " BIG WHITE THING!!!!! "

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Dec 20, 2007 11:29 pm Me: Do you take any medications? Gendo: No. Me: Do you smoke? Gendo: No, that will give you cancer. Me: Do you drink? Gendo: No, that stuff will kill you. Me: Do you use any street drugs? Gendo: OH YEAH, MAN I SMOKE CRACK! [/real life story from the medical wards (Gendo replacing my patient, obviously)]

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Thu Dec 20, 2007 11:32 pm what a dumb butt :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Fri Dec 21, 2007 1:01 am BrikHaus wrote: Me: Do you take any medications? Gendo: No. Me: Do you smoke? Gendo: No, that will give you cancer. Me: Do you drink? Gendo: No, that stuff will kill you. Me: Do you use any street drugs? Gendo: OH YEAH, MAN I SMOKE CRACK! [/real life story from the medical wards (Gendo replacing my patient, obviously)]
